events.name: ice_volcano
events.description: Cryovolcanic eruption 200km north — ground tremors felt.

events.name: epidemic
events.description: Regolith dust causes chronic respiratory inflammation.

subsim_log.expression: (let ((trust-score (* empathy resolve))) (if (> trust-score 0.4) (+ trust-score faith) (- trust-score paranoia)))
(let ((survival (+ (* food 0.3) (* water 0.3) (* power 0.2) (* air 0.2)))) (if (> survival 0.6) (+ survival 0.1) (- survival 0.2)))

meta_awareness.insight: Ripple Tide asks: 'If I am a LisPy data structure, can I rewrite myself?'
Moss Stone notices patterns in the dust storms that feel authored.
Haze Cliff dreams of a vast interpreter evaluating their every choice.
Opal Creek wonders why the colony history feels like it follows a script.
Bloom Peak notices patterns in the dust storms that feel authored.
